---
title: "SyNResult"
generated: true
description: "Output of the greedy-SyN recipe."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._syn`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:SyNResult -->
```python
class SyNResult(NamedTuple)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:SyNResult -->
Output of the greedy-SyN recipe.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
